title: Mom
tmdbOverview: After her stepdaughter is sexually assaulted at a party, a furious mother sets out to destroy the lives of the four perpetrators who walked free.
synopsis: Mom (2017) is a crime, drama and thriller film from India. It holds a solid 7.2 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a 15 certification (GB rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
